title: stelis ciliaris
intro: Stelis ciliaris is a type of orchid plant species, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stelis ciliaris include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. Stelis ciliaris can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat various health conditions.
